title: 日本ダービーの後に・勝者とは、

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a fierce battle, Winning Ticket comes out
on top at the Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Everyone celebrates the racer for finally fulfilling
her dream. It's a dazzling sight for Narita Taishin.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But she's not one to settle for anything but first
place.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin reaffirms her dedication to keep
pushing on, so she can seize victory at the final
race of the Triple Crown tour—the Kikuka Sho.
